---
title: "Metaweb Assembly Simulations"
output: html_document
editor_options: 
  chunk_output_type: console
---

## Setup

```{r setup, echo = FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE)


# Check and install required packages
required_packages <- c(
  "lhs", "dplyr", "purrr", "igraph", "ggplot2", "tibble", "doFuture","devtools","abc", "tidyverse", "viridisLite"
)
for (pkg in required_packages) {
  if (!requireNamespace(pkg, quietly = TRUE)) {
    install.packages(pkg, repos = "https://cloud.r-project.org")
  }
  require(pkg, character.only = TRUE)
}


# Install meweasmo from GitHub if not installed
if (!requireNamespace("meweasmo", quietly = TRUE)) {
  devtools::install_github("lsaravia/meweasmo")
}
library(meweasmo)

# Install multiweb from GitHub if not installed
if (!requireNamespace("multiweb", quietly = TRUE)) {
  devtools::install_github("lsaravia/multiweb")
}
library(multiweb)

source("R/network_fun.r")

# load network_info
network_info <- readRDS("Data/network_info.rds")

```

## Parameter Ranges and Simulation Settings and Run Simulations

```{r simulMetaWeb_NS, eval=FALSE, message=TRUE, warning=TRUE}

# Parameter ranges (adjust as needed)

par_ranges <- matrix(c(0.01, 0.3, 0.001, 0.5, 0.1, 0.9), nrow=3, byrow=TRUE)
nsims <- 10000
model_type <- 1 # or as needed for your function

if(FALSE) {
# Remove networks with "std" in the site name
  network_info <- network_info %>% filter(!grepl("std", site, ignore.case = TRUE))
} else {
# Only networks with "std" in the site name
  # network_info <- network_info %>% filter(grepl("std", site, ignore.case = TRUE))
  # network_info <- network_info[10:11,]
}  
# Function to run simulations for a single igraph object
run_simulation_for_network <- function(g, net_name) {
  A <- igraph::as_adjacency_matrix(g, sparse=FALSE)
  sim <- sim_metaWebAssembly_lhs(3, nsims, par_ranges, A, model_type) %>%
    mutate(model_type="Continuous", model="Prob", Metaweb=net_name)
  return(sim)
}

## Run Simulations for All Networks

# Assuming network_info has columns 'site' and 'igraph'
require(tictoc)
tic("Running simulations for all networks")
simMetaWebAssembly <- purrr::map2_dfr(
    network_info$igraph,
    network_info$site,
    run_simulation_for_network
  )
toc()

# Save results and add it to already simulated data
#
if (file.exists("Data/simulations_metaWebAssembly_all_networks.rds")) {
  simMetaWebAssembly <- bind_rows(simMetaWebAssembly, readRDS("Data/simulations_metaWebAssembly_all_networks.rds"))
  message("Add simulations to simMetaWebAssembly from RDS file.")
}

saveRDS(simMetaWebAssembly, "Data/simulations_metaWebAssembly_all_networks.rds")
```

## Fit Metaweb Assembly Model

```{r FitMetaWebAssembly, eval=FALSE, message=TRUE, warning=TRUE}
# if the file not exist load it
if (file.exists("Data/simulations_metaWebAssembly_all_networks.rds")) {
  simMetaWebAssembly <- readRDS("Data/simulations_metaWebAssembly_all_networks.rds")
  message("Loaded simMetaWebAssembly from RDS file.")
}

all_results_list <- purrr::pmap(
  list(
    emp_S = network_info$S,
    emp_C = network_info$C,
    web_name = network_info$site
  ),
  function(emp_S, emp_C, web_name) {
    #fit_metaWebAssembly_model(emp_S, emp_C, web_name, simMetaWebAssembly)
    CI_metaWebAssembly_model(emp_S, emp_C, web_name, simMetaWebAssembly)
  }
)

# and then row-binds them into a single data frame.
fittedMetaWeb <- purrr::map_dfr(all_results_list, "sel")

# Extract and combine the 'gof_rej_data' components into another data frame
gof_rej_df <- purrr::map_dfr(all_results_list, "gof")


## Save Fitted Results
if (file.exists("Data/fittedMetaWeb_all_networks.rds")) {
  f_MetaWeb <- readRDS("Data/fittedMetaWeb_all_networks.rds")
  fittedMetaWeb <- bind_rows(fittedMetaWeb, f_MetaWeb)
  message("Loaded simMetaWebAssembly from RDS file.")
}
if (file.exists("Data/gof_all_networks.rds")) {
  g_rej_all <- readRDS("Data/gof_all_networks.rds")
  gof_rej_df <- bind_rows(gof_rej_df, g_rej_all)
  message("Loaded gof_all_networks from RDS file.")
}

saveRDS(fittedMetaWeb, "Data/fittedMetaWeb_all_networks.rds")
saveRDS(gof_rej_df, "Data/gof_all_networks.rds")

fittedMetaWeb %>% filter(min_dist)
```
## Plot simulation ranges of parameters to check fit

```{r plotParRange, eval=FALSE, message=TRUE, warning=TRUE}

fittedMetaWeb <- readRDS("Data/fittedMetaWeb_all_networks.rds")

# Crear un data frame con los lĂ­mites para facilitar el ploteo con facet_wrap
parameter_limits <- tibble::tibble(
  parameter = c("a", "m", "se"),
  min_val = par_ranges[, 1],
  max_val = par_ranges[, 2]
)

# --- Transformar fittedMetaWeb a formato largo para los parĂˇmetros m, a, se ---
fitted_long <- fittedMetaWeb %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = c(m, a, se), # Seleccionar las columnas de los parĂˇmetros a pivotar
    names_to = "parameter", # Nombre de la nueva columna que contendrĂˇ los nombres de los parĂˇmetros
    values_to = "value" # Nombre de la nueva columna que contendrĂˇ los valores de los parĂˇmetros
  )

# --- Graficar las distribuciones ---
plots <- list()
for (i in seq_along(network_info$site)) {
  net_name <- network_info$site[i]
  fl <- fitted_long %>% filter(Metaweb == net_name)
  p <- ggplot(fitted_long, aes(x = value)) +
    geom_density(fill = "steelblue", alpha = 0.7) + # O geom_histogram(bins = 30, fill = "steelblue", alpha = 0.7)
    facet_wrap(vars( parameter), scales = "free_x", ncol = 1) + # Un facet por parĂˇmetro, con escala x libre
    geom_vline(data = parameter_limits, aes(xintercept = min_val),
               linetype = "dashed", color = "red", size = 0.8) +
    geom_vline(data = parameter_limits, aes(xintercept = max_val),
               linetype = "dashed", color = "red", size = 0.8) +
    labs(
      title = net_name,
      x = "Valor del ParĂˇmetro",
      y = "Densidad"
    ) +
    theme_bw(base_size = 14) +
    theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5))  # Centrar el tĂ­tulo


  print(p)
}
# Opcional: Guardar el grĂˇfico
# ggsave("parameter_distributions.png", plot = p, width = 8, height = 10, units = "in", dpi = 300)

```

## Plot a vs m for Each Network

```{r plotSvsC, eval=FALSE, message=TRUE, warning=TRUE}
library(ggplot2)

# Ensure simMetaWebAssembly has columns S, C, and Metaweb

# Loop over each network/site
plots <- list()
for (i in seq_along(network_info$site)) {
  net_name <- network_info$site[i]
  sim_data <- fittedMetaWeb %>% filter(Metaweb == net_name)
  
  p <- ggplot(sim_data, aes(x = a, y = m)) +
    geom_point(alpha = 0.3, color = "blue") +
    labs(
      title = paste( net_name),
      x = "a parameter",
      y = "m parameter"
    ) +
    theme_minimal()
  
    plots[[i]] <- p
}
plots

```

## Simulate for each network and calculate metrics

```{r simMetaWebMetrics_NS, eval=TRUE, message=TRUE, warning=TRUE}
# Load the fittedMetaWeb data
fittedMetaWeb <- readRDS("Data/fittedMetaWeb_all_networks.rds")

# Only networks with "std" in the site name
# network_info <- network_info %>% filter(!(site %in% c("WeddellSea","BeagleChannel")))
# network_info <- network_info[10:11,]

if (file.exists("Data/simulations_metaWebAssembly_all_networks.rds")) {
  simMetaWebMetrics <- readRDS("Data/simulations_metaWeb_metrics.rds")
  message("Loaded simMetaWebAssembly from RDS file.")
} else {
  simMetaWebMetrics <- tibble::tibble()
}

require(tictoc)
tic()
simulated_metaweb_metrics <- lapply(seq_along(network_info$site), function(i) {
  message("Simulating for site: ", network_info$site[i])

  # Simulate metaweb metrics
  sim <- simulate_metaweb_metrics(as_adjacency_matrix(network_info$igraph[i][[1]],sparse=FALSE),
                                                      fittedMetaWeb, 
                          network_info$site[i], nsim=1000)

  return(sim)
})
simulated_metaweb_metrics <- bind_rows(simulated_metaweb_metrics)
toc()

simMetaWebMetrics <- bind_rows(simMetaWebMetrics, simulated_metaweb_metrics)

# Calculate Rank/S 

simMetaWebMetrics <- simMetaWebMetrics %>% mutate(relRank = Rank/S)

saveRDS(simMetaWebMetrics,"Data/simulations_metaWeb_metrics.rds")
```

# Plot Metaweb metrics vs empirical

## UPDATED Entropy = 1 - Entropy

```{r plotMetaWebMetrics, eval=FALSE, message=TRUE, warning=TRUE}
simMetaWebMetrics <- readRDS("Data/simulations_metaWeb_metrics.rds") %>% mutate(SVDComplexity= 1 - Entropy,
                                                                                RankDeficiency = 1 - relRank)
require(patchwork)
network_info$site
network_info <- filter(network_info, !(site %in% c("WeddellSea","BeagleChannel","NorthernScotia","SouthernScotia")))
network_info <- network_info %>% mutate(relRank=Rank/S,RankDeficiency=1 - relRank, SVDComplexity= 1 - Entropy)

plot_list <- plot_empirical_vs_simulated_metrics(network_info,simMetaWebMetrics, metrics=c("S", "C","RankDeficiency", "SVDComplexity", "Modularity"))

combined_plot <- wrap_plots(plot_list, ncol = 2, guides = "collect", axes="collect_x") &
  theme(legend.position = "bottom")

ggsave("Figures/empirical_vs_simulated_metrics.png", 
          plot = combined_plot, 
          height = 6, 
          width = 10,
          bg = "white")

plot_list <- plot_empirical_vs_simulated_metrics(network_info,simMetaWebMetrics, metrics=c("LD", "TLmean","Vulnerability","Generality"))

combined_plot <- wrap_plots(plot_list, ncol = 2, guides = "collect", axes="collect_x") &
  theme(legend.position = "bottom")

ggsave("Figures/empirical_vs_simulated_metrics_LD_TL.png", 
          plot = combined_plot, 
          height = 6, 
          width = 10,
          bg = "white")


```

# Plot Metaweb metrics vs empirical

## Metrics vs Latitude and Area


```{r plotMetaWebMetrics1, eval=FALSE, message=TRUE, warning=TRUE}
simMetaWebMetrics <- readRDS("Data/simulations_metaWeb_metrics.rds") %>% mutate(SVDComplexity= 1 - Entropy,
                                                                                RankDeficiency = 1 - relRank)

#
## Metrics vs Latitude and Area
#

plot_list <- plot_metric_vs_latitude_ci(network_info, simMetaWebMetrics,fit_model = TRUE, metrics = c( "C", "SVDComplexity", "Modularity"))
qr_models <- plot_list$models

plots  <- plot_list$plots
#plots$Entropy <- plots$Entropy + ylab("SVD Complexity")

plot_list <- plot_metric_vs_latitude_ci(network_info, simMetaWebMetrics,fit_model = FALSE, metrics = c( "C", "SVDComplexity", "Modularity"),xvar = "log_area")
plots1 <- plot_list$plots
#plots1$Entropy <- plots1$Entropy + ylab("SVD Complexity")

plots <- c(plots,plots1)

plot_list <- plot_metric_vs_latitude_ci(network_info, simMetaWebMetrics,fit_model = FALSE, metrics = c( "C", "SVDComplexity", "Modularity"),xvar = "impact_mean")
plot_list$plots
plots1 <- plot_list$plots
#plots1$Entropy <- plots1$Entropy + ylab("SVD Complexity")

plots <- c(plots,plots1)

### I need to arrange the list to show two columns 
plots_grouped <- unlist(split(plots, names(plots)), recursive = FALSE)

require(patchwork)

combined_plot <- wrap_plots(plots_grouped, ncol = 3, guides = "collect", axes="collect") &
  theme(legend.position = "bottom")
ggsave("Figures/metric_Entropy_vs_lat_area_ci.png", 
          plot = combined_plot, 
          height = 6, 
          width = 10,
          bg = "white")


#
# Relative Rank Rank/S
# LD and TLmean
#
simMetaWebMetrics <- simMetaWebMetrics %>% mutate( RankDeficiency = 1 - relRank)
plot_list <- plot_metric_vs_latitude_ci(network_info, simMetaWebMetrics, metrics = c("LD", "TLmean","RankDeficiency") , fit_model = TRUE)
qr_models <- append(qr_models,plot_list$models)
plots <- c(plot_list$plots)


plot_list <- plot_metric_vs_latitude_ci(network_info, simMetaWebMetrics, metrics = c("LD", "TLmean", "RankDeficiency"), 
                                        xvar = "log_area",fit_model=FALSE)
plots <- c(plots,plot_list$plots)

plot_list <- plot_metric_vs_latitude_ci(network_info, simMetaWebMetrics, metrics = c("LD", "TLmean", "RankDeficiency"), 
                                        xvar = "impact_mean",fit_model=FALSE)
plots <- c(plots,plot_list$plots)


plots_grouped <- unlist(split(plots, names(plots)), recursive = FALSE)
names(plots_grouped)

combined_plot <- wrap_plots(plots_grouped, ncol = 3, guides = "collect", axes="collect") &
  theme(legend.position = "bottom")

ggsave("Figures/metric_LD_TL_vs_lat_area_ci.png", 
          plot = combined_plot, 
          height = 6, 
          width = 10,
          bg = "white")

#qr_models <- c(qr_models, plot_list$models)
saveRDS(qr_models, "Data/qr_models.rds")
knitr::kable( summarize_gam_summaries(qr_models),digits=4)
```

### Quantil models S Added

|metric         |term        | estimate| p_value|
|:--------------|:-----------|--------:|-------:|
|C              |latitude    |   0.0025|  0.0000|
|C              |log_area    |   0.0155|  0.0000|
|C              |impact_mean |  -0.0494|  0.0000|
|SVDComplexity  |latitude    |   0.0035|  0.0000|
|SVDComplexity  |log_area    |   0.0103|  0.0000|
|SVDComplexity  |impact_mean |  -0.0066|  0.0000|
|Modularity     |latitude    |  -0.0054|  0.0000|
|Modularity     |log_area    |  -0.0194|  0.0000|
|Modularity     |impact_mean |  -0.1011|  0.0000|
|LD             |latitude    |   0.8998|  0.0000|
|LD             |log_area    |   3.3127|  0.0000|
|LD             |impact_mean |  -4.0007|  0.0000|
|TLmean         |latitude    |   0.0362|  0.0000|
|TLmean         |log_area    |   0.1774|  0.0000|
|TLmean         |impact_mean |  -0.0074|  0.0802|
|RankDeficiency |latitude    |   0.0011|  0.0000|
|RankDeficiency |log_area    |  -0.0099|  0.0000|
|RankDeficiency |impact_mean |  -0.1372|  0.0000|
|MEing_stable   |latitude    |  -0.0073|  0.0000|
|MEing_stable   |log_area    |  -0.0204|  0.0000|
|MEing_stable   |impact_mean |  -0.0554|  0.0007|

### Quantil models C added

|metric         |term        | estimate| p_value|
|:--------------|:-----------|--------:|-------:|
|C             |latitude    |  -0.0004|       0|
|C             |log_area    |   0.0195|       0|
|C             |impact_mean |   0.1493|       0|
|SVDComplexity |latitude    |   0.0019|       0|
|SVDComplexity |log_area    |   0.0032|       0|
|SVDComplexity |impact_mean |   0.0063|       0|
|Modularity    |latitude    |   0.0013|       0|
|Modularity    |log_area    |   0.0059|       0|
|Modularity    |impact_mean |  -0.1134|       0|
|LD             |latitude    |   0.3913|   0e+00|
|LD             |log_area    |   1.1366|   0e+00|
|LD             |impact_mean |   0.7398|   0e+00|
|TLmean         |latitude    |   0.0133|   0e+00|
|TLmean         |log_area    |   0.0947|   0e+00|
|TLmean         |impact_mean |   0.0652|   3e-04|
|RankDeficiency |latitude    |   0.0083|   0e+00|
|RankDeficiency |log_area    |   0.0122|   0e+00|
|RankDeficiency |impact_mean |  -0.1394|   0e+00|
|MEing_stable   |latitude    |  -0.0018|  0.0000|
|MEing_stable   |log_area    |  -0.0009|  0.2227|
|MEing_stable   |impact_mean |  -0.0288|  0.0460|

### GAM models - S added

|Metric         |Term        |    edf| p-value| DevianceExplained|
|:--------------|:-----------|------:|-------:|-----------------:|
|C              |log_area    | 1.0001|  0.0000|              89.4|
|C              |latitude    | 2.9998|  0.0000|              89.4|
|C              |impact_mean | 1.0001|  0.6052|              89.4|
|SVDComplexity  |log_area    | 2.0598|  0.0734|              94.2|
|SVDComplexity  |latitude    | 1.9397|  0.0000|              94.2|
|SVDComplexity  |impact_mean | 1.0004|  0.0355|              94.2|
|Modularity     |log_area    | 1.9400|  0.0000|              74.0|
|Modularity     |latitude    | 2.0560|  0.0000|              74.0|
|Modularity     |impact_mean | 1.0028|  0.0002|              74.0|
|LD             |log_area    | 2.0439|  0.7582|              90.6|
|LD             |latitude    | 1.9534|  0.0715|              90.6|
|LD             |impact_mean | 1.0014|  0.0506|              90.6|
|TLmean         |log_area    | 1.0000|  0.0191|              86.5|
|TLmean         |latitude    | 1.8786|  0.1852|              86.5|
|TLmean         |impact_mean | 1.0025|  0.3691|              86.5|
|RankDeficiency |log_area    | 1.9224|  0.0000|              83.4|
|RankDeficiency |latitude    | 2.0751|  0.0538|              83.4|
|RankDeficiency |impact_mean | 1.0012|  0.0000|              83.4|
|MEing_stable   |log_area    | 2.0040|  0.1158|               8.6|
|MEing_stable   |latitude    | 1.8904|  0.0000|               8.6|
|MEing_stable   |impact_mean | 1.0004|  0.0237|               8.6|

# Plot Metaweb metrics vs empirical GAM -- With depth!!


```{r plotMetaWebMetricsGam, eval=FALSE, message=TRUE, warning=TRUE}
simMetaWebMetrics <- readRDS("Data/simulations_metaWeb_metrics.rds") %>% mutate(SVDComplexity= 1 - Entropy,
                                                                                RankDeficiency = 1 - relRank) %>%
  filter( !(Metaweb %in% c("WeddellSea","BeagleChannel","NorthernScotia","SouthernScotia")))

#
## Metrics vs Latitude and Area
#
require(fitdistrplus)
descdist(simMetaWebMetrics$C, boot=1000)
plot_metric_density(simMetaWebMetrics, network_info, "C")
plot_metric_density(simMetaWebMetrics, network_info, "Modularity")
plot_metric_density(simMetaWebMetrics, network_info, "SVDComplexity")

plot_list <- plot_metric_vs_latitude_ci_gam(network_info, simMetaWebMetrics,fit_model = TRUE, metrics = c( "C", "SVDComplexity", "Modularity"),xvar = "latitude")
qr_models <- plot_list$deviance
plots0  <- plot_list$plots
plots0$C <- NULL
#plots0$Modularity <- NULL

plot_list <- plot_metric_vs_latitude_ci_gam(network_info, simMetaWebMetrics,fit_model = TRUE, metrics = c( "C", "SVDComplexity", "Modularity"),xvar = "depth_m")
# only p< 0.05
plots  <- plot_list$plots
plots$SVDComplexity <- NULL
plots$Modularity <- NULL


plot_list <- plot_metric_vs_latitude_ci_gam(network_info, simMetaWebMetrics,fit_model = FALSE, metrics = c( "C", "SVDComplexity", "Modularity"),xvar = "log_area")
plots1 <- plot_list$plots
plots1$SVDComplexity <- NULL
plots1$C <- NULL

plots <- c(plots0,plots,plots1)

plot_list <- plot_metric_vs_latitude_ci_gam(network_info, simMetaWebMetrics,fit_model = FALSE, metrics = c( "C", "SVDComplexity", "Modularity"),xvar = "impact_mean")
plot_list$plots
plots2 <- plot_list$plots

plot_list <- plot_metric_vs_latitude_ci_gam(network_info, simMetaWebMetrics,fit_model = FALSE, metrics = c( "C", "SVDComplexity", "Modularity"),xvar = "S")
plot_list$plots
plots2 <- plot_list$plots
plots2$SVDComplexity <- NULL
plots2$C <- NULL
plots <- c(plots,plots2)


### I need to arrange the list to show two columns 
plots_grouped <- unlist(split(plots, names(plots)), recursive = FALSE)
require(patchwork)
combined_plot <- wrap_plots(list(plots[[5]],plots[[4]],plots[[2]]), ncol = 3, guides = "collect", axes="collect") &
  theme(legend.position = "bottom")

# Only p < 0.05
#
ggsave("Figures/metric_Mod_vs_S_lat_area_sig_gam.png",
          plot = combined_plot,
          height = 6,
          width = 10,
          bg = "white")


#
# Relative Rank Rank/S
# LD and TLmean
#
plot_list <- plot_metric_vs_latitude_ci_gam(network_info, simMetaWebMetrics, metrics = c("LD", "TLmean","RankDeficiency") , fit_model = TRUE)
qr_models <- bind_rows(qr_models,plot_list$deviance)
plots3 <- c(plot_list$plots)


plot_list <- plot_metric_vs_latitude_ci_gam(network_info, simMetaWebMetrics, metrics = c("LD", "TLmean", "RankDeficiency"), 
                                        xvar = "log_area",fit_model=FALSE)
plots4 <- plot_list$plots
# p < 0.05 plots4$TLmean

plot_list <- plot_metric_vs_latitude_ci_gam(network_info, simMetaWebMetrics, metrics = c("LD", "TLmean", "RankDeficiency"), 
                                        xvar = "impact_mean",fit_model=FALSE)
plots5 <- plot_list$plots
# p < 0.05 plots5$RankDeficiency

plot_list <- plot_metric_vs_latitude_ci_gam(network_info, simMetaWebMetrics, metrics = c("LD", "TLmean", "RankDeficiency"), 
                                        xvar = "S",fit_model=FALSE)
plots6 <- plot_list$plots
# p < 0.05 plots6$RankDeficiency


#plots_grouped <- unlist(split(plots, names(plots)), recursive = FALSE)
#names(plots_grouped)

# Here I included the stability plot from plot_list1 in Stabilitysimulations.Rmd
#
combined_plot <- wrap_plots(plots[[1]],plots7$MEing_stable,plots[[3]],
ncol = 3, guides = "collect", axes="collect") &
  theme(legend.position = "bottom")

ggsave("Figures/metric_SVDC_MAXE_C_vs_lat_area_ci_gam.png", 
          plot = combined_plot, 
          height = 6, 
          width = 10,
          bg = "white")

combined_plot <- wrap_plots(plots4$TLmean, plots5$RankDeficiency,plots6$RankDeficiency, 
ncol = 3, guides = "collect", axes="collect") &
  theme(legend.position = "bottom")

ggsave("Figures/metric_TL_RD_vs_lat_area_ci_gam.png", 
          plot = combined_plot, 
          height = 6, 
          width = 10,
          bg = "white")


#qr_models <- readRDS("Data/qr_models_gam.rds")
saveRDS(qr_models, "Data/qr_models_gam.rds")
knitr::kable( qr_models,digits=4)
```

|Metric         |Term           |    edf| p-value| PartialDeviance| TotalDevianceExplained|
|:--------------|:--------------|------:|-------:|---------------:|----------------------:|
|C              |s(S)           | 1.0003|  0.4121|          2.2282|                   89.4|
|C              |s(log_area)    | 1.0003|  0.7780|          0.2638|                   89.4|
|C              |s(latitude)    | 1.0496|  0.3471|          3.4241|                   89.4|
|C              |s(impact_mean) | 1.0006|  0.7286|          0.3990|                   89.4|
|C              |s(depth_m)     | 1.0001|  0.0019|         31.8231|                   89.4|
|C              |s(site)        | 0.9492|  0.0000|         61.8618|                   89.4|
|SVDComplexity  |s(S)           | 1.0002|  0.6288|          0.6628|                   94.4|
|SVDComplexity  |s(log_area)    | 1.0002|  0.3721|          2.2609|                   94.4|
|SVDComplexity  |s(latitude)    | 1.0363|  0.0322|         13.9596|                   94.4|
|SVDComplexity  |s(impact_mean) | 1.0004|  0.6884|          0.4561|                   94.4|
|SVDComplexity  |s(depth_m)     | 1.0000|  0.0757|          8.9453|                   94.4|
|SVDComplexity  |s(site)        | 0.9629|  0.0000|         73.7153|                   94.4|
|Modularity     |s(S)           | 1.0000|  0.0002|          1.9378|                   74.3|
|Modularity     |s(log_area)    | 1.0000|  0.0188|          0.7733|                   74.3|
|Modularity     |s(latitude)    | 1.0006|  0.0340|          0.6310|                   74.3|
|Modularity     |s(impact_mean) | 1.0000|  0.2208|          0.2101|                   74.3|
|Modularity     |s(depth_m)     | 1.0000|  0.8680|          0.0039|                   74.3|
|Modularity     |s(site)        | 0.9985|  0.0000|         96.4439|                   74.3|
|LD             |s(S)           | 1.0000|  0.8878|          0.0267|                   90.6|
|LD             |s(log_area)    | 1.0000|  0.6082|          0.3514|                   90.6|
|LD             |s(latitude)    | 1.0136|  0.3504|          1.2175|                   90.6|
|LD             |s(impact_mean) | 1.0001|  0.7834|          0.1011|                   90.6|
|LD             |s(depth_m)     | 1.0000|  0.1267|          3.1191|                   90.6|
|LD             |s(site)        | 0.9862|  0.0000|         95.1843|                   90.6|
|TLmean         |s(S)           | 1.0000|  0.1551|          0.0832|                   86.3|
|TLmean         |s(log_area)    | 1.0000|  0.0085|          0.2856|                   86.3|
|TLmean         |s(latitude)    | 1.0003|  0.0577|          0.1484|                   86.3|
|TLmean         |s(impact_mean) | 1.0000|  0.9238|          0.0004|                   86.3|
|TLmean         |s(depth_m)     | 1.0000|  0.8646|          0.0012|                   86.3|
|TLmean         |s(site)        | 0.9996|  0.0000|         99.4812|                   86.3|
|RankDeficiency |s(S)           | 1.0001|  0.0000|         16.8583|                   83.2|
|RankDeficiency |s(log_area)    | 1.0001|  0.0716|          1.6758|                   83.2|
|RankDeficiency |s(latitude)    | 1.0057|  0.4396|          0.3148|                   83.2|
|RankDeficiency |s(impact_mean) | 1.0002|  0.0023|          4.7819|                   83.2|
|RankDeficiency |s(depth_m)     | 1.0000|  0.7967|          0.0343|                   83.2|
|RankDeficiency |s(site)        | 0.9933|  0.0000|         76.3349|                   83.2|
|MEing_stable   |s(S)           | 1.0000|  0.1344|         12.3301|                   19.1|
|MEing_stable   |s(log_area)    | 1.0000|  0.2778|          6.4802|                   19.1|
|MEing_stable   |s(latitude)    | 1.0446|  0.0451|         23.1881|                   19.1|
|MEing_stable   |s(impact_mean) | 1.0002|  0.5918|          1.5806|                   19.1|
|MEing_stable   |s(depth_m)     | 1.0000|  0.4690|          2.8839|                   19.1|
|MEing_stable   |s(site)        | 0.9418|  0.0000|         53.5371|                   19.1|


# Plot Metaweb metrics vs S - GAM


```{r plotMetaWebMetricsSGam, eval=FALSE, message=TRUE, warning=TRUE}

#
# Relative Rank Rank/S
# LD and TLmean
#
plot_list <- plot_metric_vs_latitude_ci_gam(network_info, simMetaWebMetrics, metrics = c("LD", "TLmean", "RankDeficiency") , fit_model = FALSE, xvar = "S")
plots <- c(plot_list$plots)


plot_list <- plot_metric_vs_latitude_ci_gam(network_info, simMetaWebMetrics, metrics = c("LD", "TLmean", "RankDeficiency"), 
                                        xvar = "log_area",fit_model=FALSE)
plots <- c(plots,plot_list$plots)

plot_list <- plot_metric_vs_latitude_ci_gam(network_info, simMetaWebMetrics, metrics = c("LD", "TLmean", "RankDeficiency"), 
                                        xvar = "impact_mean",fit_model=FALSE)
plots <- c(plots,plot_list$plots)


plots_grouped <- unlist(split(plots, names(plots)), recursive = FALSE)
names(plots_grouped)

combined_plot <- wrap_plots(plots_grouped, ncol = 3, guides = "collect", axes="collect") &
  theme(legend.position = "bottom")

ggsave("Figures/metric_LD_TL_vs_lat_area_ci_gam.png", 
          plot = combined_plot, 
          height = 6, 
          width = 10,
          bg = "white")


#
# S plots only significant ones
#
plot_list <- plot_metric_vs_latitude_ci_gam(network_info, simMetaWebMetrics,fit_model = FALSE, metrics = c( "Modularity","TLmean","RankDeficiency"),xvar = "S")

# plot_list1 from Stabilitysimulations.Rmd
plots <- c(plot_list$plots,plot_list1$plots)

combined_plot <- wrap_plots(plots, ncol = 2, guides = "collect", axes="collect") &
  theme(legend.position = "bottom")
ggsave("Figures/metric_Q_TL_MEing_vs_S_ci_gam.png", 
          plot = combined_plot, 
          height = 10, 
          width = 10,
          bg = "white")

```


```{r CheckCorrelation_createTables, eval=FALSE, message=TRUE, warning=TRUE}

library(ggplot2)
library(GGally)
library(dplyr)

# Select relevant columns
network_info %>%
  dplyr::select(C,S,latitude, area_km2, impact_mean) %>%
  ggpairs(
    upper = list(continuous = wrap("cor", size = 4)),  # correlation in upper panels
    lower = list(continuous = wrap("points", alpha = 0.7, size = 3)), # scatterplots
    diag = list(continuous = wrap("densityDiag", alpha = 0.5))        # density plots on diagonal
  ) +
  theme_bw()



# Create RankDeficiency
simMetaWebMetrics <- simMetaWebMetrics %>%
  mutate(RankDeficiency = 1 - relRank)

# Function to compute mean and 95% interval
# Function to compute mean and 95% interval, stacked inside a single cell
summarize_metric <- function(x, digits = 3) {
  m   <- mean(x, na.rm = TRUE)
  lwr <- quantile(x, 0.025, na.rm = TRUE)
  upr <- quantile(x, 0.975, na.rm = TRUE)
  # Use \shortstack{ ... \\ {\tiny(...)} } to keep the linebreak INSIDE the cell
  sprintf("\\shortstack{%0.*f \\\\ {\\tiny(%0.*f--%0.*f)}}",
          digits, m, digits, lwr, digits, upr)
}

# Summarize by Metaweb
network_info <- 

summary_table <- simMetaWebMetrics %>% rename(Network = Metaweb ) %>% filter(!(Network %in% c("WeddellSea","BeagleChannel","NorthernScotia","SouthernScotia"))) %>%
  group_by(Network) %>%
  summarise(
    C = summarize_metric(C),
    LD = summarize_metric(LD),
    TLmean = summarize_metric(TLmean),
    SVDComplexity = summarize_metric(SVDComplexity),
    RankDeficiency = summarize_metric(RankDeficiency),
    Modularity = summarize_metric(Modularity),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

summary_table

library(xtable)

# Convert to LaTeX table
print(
  xtable(summary_table,
         caption = "Summary of network metrics across 1000 simulations for each metaweb. Values are means with 95\\% intervals in parentheses.",
         label = "tab:metaweb_metrics",
         align = c("l","l","c","c","c","c","c","c")),
  include.rownames = FALSE,
  sanitize.text.function = identity,  # keeps the formatted mean (lwrâ€“upr)
  booktabs = TRUE
)

```
